body.title: Remove KoboldCpp dead code + references
body.result: Removed all KoboldCpp dead references from docs/config. Updated CLAUDE.md (env vars, tier ladder, Known Broken), STARTUP_SHIM.md (example env block → Ollama), boot_notes.md (fact-finding hierarchy + cluster notes), gap_analysis.md (boot check row). Python code was already clean — tier.2 had been Ollama since 2026-03-09c. Commit 8199e712.
body.description: KoboldCpp is gone entirely. Clean up: (1) tier.2 KoboldCpp branch in inference_gateway.py — remove or replace with Ollama; (2) KOBOLDCPP_HOST / KOBOLDCPP_PORT env vars from .env and CLAUDE.md; (3) any tier ladder comments/docs that reference KoboldCpp; (4) update CLAUDE.md 'Known Broken' section. New tier ladder: 1=habit/graph, 2=Ollama, 3=OR, 4=arbiter. Ref: D234.
